title: Lesson 798: 外れる, 肌着, 果して...

items.gloss: to be disconnected; to get out of place; to be off; to be out (e.g. of gear); to miss the mark; to get it wrong (e.g. guess, expectation); to draw a blank (e.g. lottery); to be removed; to be excluded; to be contrary to; to go against
as was expected; just as one thought; sure enough; really; actually; ever
bowl; pot; basin; flowerpot; crown; brainpan
show (of power, ability, etc.); exhibition; demonstration; display; manifestation
firing (esp. a rocket or missile); launching; shooting; discharge; catapult; ejaculation
idea; conception; way of thinking; expression
